info.name: Meet Bot
info.description: API for the Google Meet recorder. Set `baseUrl` (default http://localhost:3000). **Production:** set `INTERNAL_API_KEY` on the server and assign the same value to collection variable `internalApiKey` — send it as `Authorization: Bearer {{internalApiKey}}` on sensitive legacy routes (all requests below except Health). Cookie-authenticated dashboard traffic uses `/me/bots` and does not need this header.

request.description: Shows BullMQ job counts. If `waiting` stays high, the worker is not consuming (wrong Redis or worker down). Requires INTERNAL_API_KEY when configured on the server.
Lists jobs with `times_in_meet` (1 once bot reaches lobby/in-call/recording), `processing_attempts`, states, timestamps. Requires INTERNAL_API_KEY when configured.
Destroys all BullMQ jobs and Redis keys `meet-bot:*` (cancel flags, times-in-meet). Active workers may error until idle. Requires INTERNAL_API_KEY when configured.
Returns 202 with `bot_id`. When INTERNAL_API_KEY is set, anonymous calls must include it; otherwise sign in and use POST /me/bots. Copy `botId` into the collection variable for the other requests.
When the job is `completed`, `result` is enriched from disk. Requires job owner session cookie OR INTERNAL_API_KEY when configured.
If Spaces upload succeeded, returns 302 to public URL. Otherwise streams WebM. Same auth as status.
Sets a Redis flag so the worker closes Chromium within seconds while recording/joining. Same auth as status.
Completed/failed/waiting: removes job. Active: requests cancel (202). Same auth as status.
